reasoning: The question asks if Solana (SOL) will reach $350 on Binance in October 2025. Current information strictly before the cutoff date of October 26, 2025, shows that SOL was trading between $180 and $210 throughout the month, with the most recent confirmed prices on October 24 and October 25 being around $190–$200. Furthermore, reports consistently refer to Solana's 2025 all-time high as being strictly below $300 (around $268 or $295). Given that October 2025 has less than a week remaining and SOL would literally need to nearly double its value (climb from ~$190 to $350) within these few days, the base rate odds of such an event happening organically, sans extraordinary catalysts, are practically negligible. Additionally, there are no reports of a rogue wick scaling to $350 on Binance (since such events generate instant news), and instead, a mid-October flash crash further suppressed prices. Market patterns provide no reason to believe an 80% daily spike is imminent. Therefore, probability lies at the minimum possible threshold.
